title: dt-pilot MCP servers catalog
description: Schema for .vscode/mcp.servers.catalog.json — the authoritative list of MCP servers dt-pilot knows how to launch and toggle.

id.description: Server identifier; must match the key under 'servers' in .vscode/mcp.json.

defaultEnabled.description: Initial state when New-McpSessionConfig.ps1 generates a fresh session config.

alwaysEnabled.description: When true, Set-McpServerState.ps1 refuses to disable this server.

requiresEnv.description: Environment variables that MUST be set for this server to function. Consumers may enforce this (e.g. a future Test-McpReadiness expansion) or use it as documentation; today the dt-pilot scripts only enforce a hardcoded subset for the dynatrace server.

acceptsOneOfEnv.description: Sets of environment variables; AT LEAST ONE complete set must be satisfied. Used to express 'either DT_PLATFORM_TOKEN, or (OAUTH_CLIENT_ID and OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET)'.
